description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a two-story structure. The upper level is clad in horizontal wood paneling and contains large, rectangular windows that provide ample natural light. The lower level is finished in light-colored brickwork and includes a mix of smaller and larger windows, as well as a single main door. The roof is predominantly flat, with some sections extending outward to create visual interest and additional space. The landscaping is minimal, with a small hedge near the main entrance. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open interior spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with wood paneling on the upper level, brickwork on the lower level, large windows, and a flat roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, a small hedge, and a mix of large and small windows on both levels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wood-paneled upper story, two large windows, and minimal lower-level fenestration.
description_view_2: Side view with extensive glazing on the lower level, multiple large windows, and a clear view of the flat roof sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a simpler facade with fewer windows and a secondary door.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door at ground level with a small hedge, no porch or overhang, minimal decorative elements
